sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39841" key="e)pikottabi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικοττᾰβίζω</orth>, <sense id="n39841.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw the cottabus on</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.110</biblScope></bibl>, prob.<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀποκοττ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
